metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Joel - She's Always a Woman.flac
metadata.file_name: Billy Joel - She's Always a Woman.flac
metadata.title: She's Always a Woman
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.18] She can kill with a smile, she can wound with her eyes
[00:13.18] And she can ruin your faith with her casual lies
[00:18.63] And she only reveals what she wants you to see
[00:23.23] She hides like a child, but she's always a woman to me
[00:31.78] She can lead you to love, she can take you or leave you
[00:36.76] She can ask for the truth, but she'll never believe
[00:41.62] And she'll take what you give her as long as it's free
[00:46.57] Yeah, she steals like a thief, but she's always a woman to me
[00:55.32] Oh, she takes care of herself
[01:02.16] She can wait if she wants
[01:05.80] She's ahead of her time
[01:11.57] Oh, and she never gives out
[01:18.74] And she never gives in
[01:22.16] She just changes her mind
[01:27.56] And she'll promise you more than the Garden of Eden
[01:32.01] Then she'll carelessly cut you and laugh while you're bleedin'
[01:36.99] But she'll bring out the best and the worst you can be
[01:42.33] Blame it all on yourself 'cause she's always a woman to me
[01:48.62] 
[02:03.22] Oh, she takes care of herself
[02:09.77] She can wait if she wants
[02:13.62] She's ahead of her time
[02:18.94] Oh, and she never gives out
[02:25.64] And she never gives in
[02:29.44] She just changes her mind
[02:34.79] She is frequently kind and she's suddenly cruel
[02:39.09] She can do as she pleases, she's nobody's fool
[02:44.49] And she can't be convicted, she's earned her degree
[02:48.96] And the most she will do is throw shadows at you
[02:53.16] But she's always a woman to me
[02:56.02]
